sourceSummary.oneLine: Product specification slides for HAD1717MC/HAD1717MG retrofit detector.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Provides detector, panel performance, power, environmental, material, location, dimension, and weight parameters for the listed models.
keyPoints: Sensor type is a-Si TFT with Gd2O2S:Tb scintillator for HAD1717MG and CsI:TI for HAD1717MC.
Detector uses 1Giga-bit Ethernet communication and supports Line(Manual) Trigger and Auto Trigger (Auto Exposure Detection).
Power input is 100 ~ 240 VAC (50/60Hz) with maximum power consumption of 50W.
Detector location is indoor with IPX4 water proof rating.

concepts.name: Panel Performance
concepts.evidence: Panel Performance Sensor Type a-Si TFT

evidence.claim: The document is a product specification for models HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG.
evidence.evidenceText: Specifications ... Product Specification ... Models HAD1717MC/HAD1717MG (HAD1717MC/HAD1717MG) Retrofit Detector

evidence.claim: The sensor type is a-Si TFT.
HAD1717MG uses Gd2O2S:Tb scintillator and HAD1717MC uses CsI:TI scintillator.
Total pixel number is 3072 x 3072 pixels and effective pixel number is 3052 x 3052 pixels.
evidence.evidenceText: Total Pixel Number 3072 x 3072 pixels ... Effective Pixel Number 3052 x 3052 pixels

evidence.claim: Total pixel area is 430 x 430mm and effective pixel area is 427 x 427mm.
evidence.evidenceText: Total Pixel Area 430 x 430mm ... Effective Pixel Area 427 x 427mm

evidence.claim: Pixel pitch is 140um and limiting resolution is maximum 3.5lp/mm.
Energy range is 40 ~ 150Kv and A/D conversion is 14/16bits.
Preview time is about 2.0 sec and cycle time is about 3.0 sec.
evidence.evidenceText: Preview time / Cycle time About 2.0 sec / About 3.0 sec

evidence.claim: Trigger modes are Line(Manual) Trigger and Auto Trigger (Auto Exposure Detection).
evidence.evidenceText: Trigger Mode Line(Manual) Trigger Auto Trigger (Auto Exposure Detection)

evidence.claim: Power input is 100 ~ 240 VAC (50/60Hz) and power consumption is maximum 50W.
evidence.evidenceText: Power Input 100 ~ 240 VAC (50/60Hz) Power Consumption(W) Max. 50W

evidence.claim: Operating temperature is 0 ℃ ~ 50 ℃ and storage temperature is -10 ℃ ~ 60 ℃.
Detector material is aluminum and carbon; power box material is steel.
evidence.evidenceText: Material Detector: Aluminum, Carbon Power box: Steel

evidence.claim: Location water proof condition is indoor (IPX4).
Detector dimensions are 460 x 460 x 15.5 mm and power box dimensions are 203.3 x 130 x 53.2 mm.
evidence.evidenceText: Physical Dimension (W x D x H) Detector: 460 x 460 x 15.5 mm Power box: 203.3 x 130 x 53.2 mm

evidence.claim: Detector weight is 3.75 Kg and power box weight is 1.5 Kg.
evidence.evidenceText: Weight Detector: 3.75 Kg Power box: 1.5 Kg
